description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily finished in light-colored brick or stone, complemented by large glass windows and metal railings. The property features a driveway with two parked cars, a front yard with several trees, and a backyard area that includes a swimming pool and patio. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, providing outdoor living spaces on both levels. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with large panes on the front and sides, maximizing natural light. The main entryway is recessed, with a covered porch and a simple, modern door design.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, balconies, and a pool, set on a landscaped lot with driveway and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with cars, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick wall, trees, and partial view of the pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and rear balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, pool, and additional trees, with a clear view of the house's flat roof and terraces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a covered porch, modern door, and minimal decorative elements
